title: Finalize milestone bookkeeping and publish missing QA checklists
description: Close stale open milestone beads that are already implemented, add missing docs referenced by README, rerun quality checks, and push final bookkeeping updates.
notes: Claimed for immediate execution. Closing stale milestones, creating missing QA checklist docs, and verifying quality gates.

title: M3: Gesture Input Engine
description: Introduce robust pointer gesture infrastructure that cleanly separates view rotation from move swipes.
notes: All M3 gesture engine tasks are complete and validated.
close_reason: Milestone complete

title: Create useCubeGestures pointer state machine
description: Implement idle -> tracking -> rotateView|sliceSwipe state machine around the cube interaction surface.
notes: Implemented pointer gesture state machine in useCubeGestures (tracking -> rotateView/sliceSwipe).
close_reason: Implemented and covered by smoke tests

title: Implement gesture thresholds and axis locking
description: Apply 8-12px start threshold and lock horizontal vs vertical axis once dominant direction is established.
notes: Implemented start thresholds, axis locking, and gesture sensitivity profiles (low/medium/high).
close_reason: Implemented and covered by unit/smoke tests

title: Add gesture safety rules and scoped touch-action
description: Ignore multi-touch for v1, handle pointer cancel/loss, and apply touch-action:none only on cube interaction area.
notes: Implemented safety rules: single-pointer behavior, pointer cancel/loss handling, and touch-action scoped to cube interaction area.
close_reason: Implemented and validated

title: Add independent viewYaw/viewPitch rotation state
description: Track view rotation outside cube move logic, clamp pitch range, and keep drag interaction smooth.
notes: Added independent viewYaw/viewPitch gesture rotation state with pitch clamping.
close_reason: Implemented and covered by unit/smoke tests

title: M1: Foundation Hardening
description: Refactor app architecture, fix lint baseline, and establish reproducible quality checks.
close_reason: Completed M1 foundation hardening refactor and quality baseline

title: Extract cube state/actions into useCubeState hook
description: Move move-execution, scramble, reset, facelets, and lastAction state into src/hooks/useCubeState.ts.
close_reason: Extracted cube state/actions into useCubeState hook

title: Extract CubeView presentational component
description: Move cube-stage rendering and face sticker rendering into src/components/CubeView.tsx with typed props.
close_reason: Extracted CubeView presentational component with typed props

title: Extract ControlsPanel presentational component
description: Move session/orientation/row/column controls into src/components/ControlsPanel.tsx while preserving current semantics.
close_reason: Extracted ControlsPanel presentational component with preserved control semantics

title: Fix lint ref-in-render issue and add check script
description: Remove render-time ref initialization pitfalls and add npm run check for typecheck + lint + build.
close_reason: Resolved ref-in-render lint issue and added npm run check

title: Document Node runtime and verify post-refactor behavior parity
description: Add .nvmrc for Node 20.19+ and confirm keyboard/button behavior parity after refactor.
close_reason: Added .nvmrc and documented runtime/check parity in README

title: Follow-up tracked verification cycle
description: Repeat fresh-eye validation with full bead tracking and Agent Mail start/finish signaling.
notes: Verification cycle complete. No additional code defects found beyond prior fixes. Quality gates remain green.
close_reason: Follow-up tracked verification completed; no additional fixes required

comments.text: Result: no new fixes required in this pass. npm run check succeeded (typecheck + lint + build). Remaining runtime caveat is local Node 18 warning from Vite until shell uses Node >=20.19.

title: Post-M1 fresh-eye audit and cleanup
description: Re-review M1 refactor with fresh eyes, fix any issues, and re-verify quality gates.
notes: Fresh-eye audit completed. Applied robustness fixes for shortcut handling (text-input guard + Space/Spacebar aliases), moved MoveHandler type to shared types to avoid presentational->hook coupling, and added engines.node >=20.19.0.
close_reason: Fresh-eye audit complete; robustness fixes applied and checks passing

comments.author: ubuntu
comments.text: Started fresh-eye audit. Reviewing App/components/hooks/constants/package docs and rerunning quality checks before applying any fixes.

comments.text: Verification: npm run check passed (typecheck + lint + build). Build still emits runtime warning under local Node 18.20.8; project now declares engines.node >=20.19.0 and .nvmrc pins 20.19.0.

title: M4: Swipe-to-Move Mobile Play
description: Enable direct row/column move execution from touch swipes while preserving predictable controls.
notes: All M4 swipe-to-move tasks are complete and validated.
close_reason: Milestone complete

title: Implement front-grid hit-region mapping
description: Determine swipe origin row/column index (top/middle/bottom and left/middle/right) from visible front face.
notes: Implemented front-grid hit-region mapping (row/column detection) from gesture surface bounds.
close_reason: Implemented and covered by unit tests

title: Map swipe direction/region to cube move commands
description: Map horizontal swipes to U/E/D and vertical swipes to L/M/R moves with consistent direction semantics.
notes: Implemented swipe direction+region to move mapping for U/E/D and L/M/R semantics.
close_reason: Implemented and covered by unit tests

title: Add live swipe feedback in UI
description: Show active row/column highlight during swipe and reuse last-action status for immediate move feedback.
notes: Added live swipe feedback overlay and swipe preview status text.
close_reason: Implemented and validated in smoke pass

title: Add mobile interaction refinements while preserving fallback controls
description: Keep keyboard/button controls intact and add optional haptics plus gesture sensitivity setting where available.
notes: Added mobile refinements: haptic feedback toggle and gesture sensitivity control while preserving keyboard/button fallback.
close_reason: Implemented and validated

title: Fresh-eyes review/fix pass for recent refactor
description: Re-read newly added and modified files with fresh eyes, fix concrete issues, run validation, and summarize outcomes.
notes: Implemented fixes: guard global key handler against modifier shortcuts (ctrl/meta/alt), honor defaultPrevented, and preserve typing contexts; added explicit type=button across control buttons. Validation: npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm run build (build passes; Vite emits Node 20.19+ recommendation warning on this machine).
close_reason: Completed fresh-eyes pass and applied fixes

title: M5: Stabilization, Testing, and Polish
description: Add automated coverage, documentation, and release checks to prevent regressions.
close_reason: M5 complete: unit/smoke tests, release + visual checklists, and passing quality gates.

title: Add unit tests for gesture-to-move mapping and rotation bounds
description: Cover swipe vector + region -> move mapping and view rotation math clamping as pure logic tests.
close_reason: Unit tests for gesture logic and rotation bounds implemented in src/hooks/useCubeGestures.logic.test.ts.

title: Add smoke tests for core interaction flows
description: Cover scramble/reset, keyboard controls, drag rotation, and swipe move end-to-end sanity flows.
close_reason: Smoke tests for scramble/reset, keyboard, drag rotation, and swipe move implemented in src/App.smoke.test.tsx.

title: Update README and create release/regression checklist
description: Document gesture controls and supported interaction matrix, then add a repeatable desktop/mobile release checklist.
notes: README updated with interaction matrix; added docs/release-regression-checklist.md and docs/visual-qa-checklist.md with screenshot artifacts.
close_reason: README updates landed and both checklist docs now exist under docs/.

Validation passed: npm run test, npm run check. Observed environment warning only: local Node is 18.20.8 while Vite 7 recommends >=20.19.

title: M2: Visual Rendering Fixes
description: Eliminate clipping/seam artifacts and make cube rendering robust across target breakpoints.
notes: All M2 rendering tasks and QA artifacts are complete.
close_reason: Milestone complete

title: Introduce geometry CSS vars and normalize face depth math
description: Add --cube-size, --cube-half, --face-depth, --face-epsilon and apply consistent translateZ usage across faces.
notes: Implemented geometry vars and normalized depth math in cube CSS (cube-size/half/face-depth/epsilon).
close_reason: Implemented and validated in app + build checks

title: Add anti-artifact safeguards for seams and z-fighting
description: Unify backface visibility, epsilon offsets, and face border/shadow treatment to reduce clipping seams.
notes: Applied anti-artifact safeguards: unified backface handling and seam-safe face/sticker treatment.
close_reason: Implemented and validated in responsive screenshots

title: Replace fixed stage sizing with responsive clamp-based sizing
description: Use clamp()-based viewport sizing and ensure cube remains centered/fully visible on mobile portrait widths.
notes: Replaced fixed stage sizing with responsive clamp-based sizing for mobile through desktop.
close_reason: Implemented and validated in responsive screenshots

title: Run visual QA checklist across target breakpoints

notes: Completed breakpoint QA (320/375/390/430/768/1024/1440), published docs/visual-qa-checklist.md, and captured docs/qa screenshots.
close_reason: Visual QA pass complete
